name: NewMPR2Slicer Color Palette
description: Color palette matching the main NewMPR2/AIPacs application

gradients.backgroundMain: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:0, y2:1, stop:0 #1a202c, stop:1 #0f1419)
gradients.backgroundPanel: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:0, y2:1, stop:0 #1f2937, stop:1 #111827)
gradients.buttonDefault: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:0, y2:1, stop:0 #374151, stop:1 #1f2937)
gradients.buttonHover: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:0, y2:1, stop:0 #4b5563, stop:1 #374151)
gradients.buttonPrimary: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:0, y2:1, stop:0 #3b82f6, stop:1 #2563eb)
gradients.buttonPrimaryHover: qlineargradient(x1:0, y1:0, x2:0, y2:1, stop:0 #60a5fa, stop:1 #3b82f6)
